3.sql: SELECT omrade AS geom FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_MakeEnvelope(430000, 6430000, 480000, 6480000), 4326), 25833));

2.description: fetch buildings in Kristiansand by kommunenummer
